zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Cheney於大約1412年出生在英國肯特易亞斯丘其時，他的父親William Cheyne28歲，母親Eleanor Salerne34歲。他和Eleanor Shottesbroke至少有4個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1467年6月20日在他的家鄉享年56歲，埋葬在英國肯特易亞斯丘其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Cheney于大约1412年出生在英国肯特易亞斯丘其时，他的父亲William Cheyne28岁，母亲Eleanor Salerne34岁。他和Eleanor Shottesbroke至少有4个儿子和5个女儿。他去世于1467年6月20日在他的家乡享年56岁，埋葬在英国肯特易亞斯丘其。

nameMeanings.name: Cheney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Chaney   with the same etymology as in 2 below.

French: topographic name for someone who lived by or in an oak wood, from Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’ (from chesne ‘oak’), or a habitational name from any of several places called (Le) Cheney, e.g. in Haute-Savoie, named with this word. Compare Chesney .

French Canadian: altered form of French Chesnay or Chenay, topographic names with the same meaning and etymology as in 2 above, or habitational names from (Le) Chesnay or (Le) Chenay, names of several places in the northwestern part of France, based on Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’. Compare Chenette and Chenier 2.

variants.name: Chenette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Armand.
Altered form of French Canadian Chenet, itself an (intermediate) altered form of Cheney 3. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.
History: The (majority of the) Chenettes are descendants of Bertrand Chesnay/Chenay dit/sieur de La Garenne from Brittany (France); see Cheney .

variants.name: Chaney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any one of several places in Normandy, Picardy, or Artois (France) named (Le) Quesnay or Quesnoy, or elsewhere in northern France named (Le or La) Chesnay or Chesnoy. The placenames all derive from Old French chesnai or its Normanno-Picard equivalent quesnai ‘oak grove’ (medieval Latin casnetum).
French: variant of Chanet, a habitational name from any of various places called Chanet or Le Chanet, from Latin canna ‘reed’ + the suffix -etum denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Cheney was born about 1412, in Eastchurch, Kent, England, his father, William Cheyne, was 28 and his mother, Eleanor Salerne, was 34. He had at least 4 sons and 5 daughters with Eleanor Shottesbroke. He died on 20 June 1467, in his hometown, at the age of 56, and was buried in Eastchurch, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Cheney est né environ 1412, à Eastchurch, Kent, Angleterre, son père, William Cheyne, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Salerne, avait 34 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles avec Eleanor Shottesbroke. Il est décédé le 20 juin 1467, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Eastchurch, Kent, Angleterre.

de.Waltham Abbey, Essex, England, United Ki: Waltham Abbey, Essex, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Cheney um 1412 in Eastchurch, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Cheyne 28 und seine Mutter Eleanor Salerne 34. Er hatte mit Eleanor Shottesbroke mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 20. Juni 1467 im Alter von 56 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Eastchurch, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Cheney è nato il circa 1412 nel Eastchurch, Kent, England, il suo padre, William Cheyne, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Salerne, aveva 34 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie con Eleanor Shottesbroke. Morì il 20 giugno 1467, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Eastchurch, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Cheneyが約1412年にイギリスケントエアストチャーチで生まれた時，父William Cheyneは28歳，母Eleanor Salerneは34歳であった。彼はEleanor Shottesbrokeとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1467年6月20日に故郷で56歳で死去し，イギリスケントエアストチャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Cheney(이)가 대략 1412년 영국 켄트 이스트c후르치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Cheyne(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Salerne(은)는 34세였다. 그는 Eleanor Shottesbroke(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1467년 6월 20일 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 이스트c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Cheney nasceu aproximadamente 1412, em Eastchurch, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Cheyne, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Salerne, tinha 34 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas com Eleanor Shottesbroke. Ele faleceu em 20 de junho de 1467, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Eastchurch, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Cheney родился около 1412 г. в местности эасчурч, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени William Cheyne было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Salerne, 34. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей от Eleanor Shottesbroke. Он умер 20 июня 1467 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности эасчурч, кэнт, Англия.
